title: Chicken Delights
excerpt: Ingredients 1 packet phyllo pastry 250 g Philadelphia cheese 350 ml sour cream 6 extra-large eggs 250 ml strong cheddar or pecorino cheese 250 g smoked chicken, shredded 250 ml soft sun-dried tomatoes 4 leeks, sliced 250 ml butter salt and pepper Method Get a fairly large tart dish and place 4 layers …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 packet phyllo pastry
  • 250 g Philadelphia cheese
  • 350 ml sour cream
  • 6 extra-large eggs
  • 250 ml strong cheddar or pecorino cheese
  • 250 g smoked chicken, shredded
  • 250 ml soft sun-dried tomatoes
  • 4 leeks, sliced
  • 250 ml butter
  • salt and pepper

Method

Get a fairly large tart dish and place 4 layers of phyllo pastry and butter in the bottom of the dish. You'll fold in the edges later.

Fry the leeks in butter until done.

Beat the Philadelphia cheese until smooth

Now beat in the eggs and sour cream.

Mix in the chicken, leeks, cheese and sun-dried tomatoes.

Pour the mixture into your tart dish.

Bake for 60 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Easy!
